briefdescription.para: This typedef contains the different background colors available.
This typedef contains Video identification information in tabular form.
This typedef contains FrameRate code information as per the HDMI 2.1b spec.
This typedef contains Resolution ID's information as per the HDMI 2.1b spec.
Version 3 AVI InfoFrame.
FRL Character Rate Enumeration.
FRL Rate Enumeration.
This typedef contains the data structure for Auxiliary Video Information Info frame.
This typedef contains the data structure for General Control Packet.
This typedef contains the data structure for Audio Infoframe.
This typedef contains the data structure for Audio Metadata Infoframe.
This typedef contains the data structure for Source Product Descriptor Infoframe.
This typedef contains the data structure for Dynamic Range and Mastering Infoframe.
This table contains the attributes for various standard resolutions.

detaileddescription.para: Each entry is of the format: 1) Resolution ID 2) Video Identification Code.

briefdescription.para: This table contains the attributes for various FRL Rate.

detaileddescription.para: Each entry is of the format: 1) Number of lanes 2) Line Rate.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the Auxiliary Video Information Info Frame.
This function retrieves the General Control Packet.
This function retrieves the Audio Info Frame.
This function retrieves the DRM Infoframes.
This function generates and sends Auxiliary Video Infoframes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem instance.

briefdescription.para: This function generates and sends Audio Infoframes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem instance.

briefdescription.para: This function converts the XVidC_ColorFormat to XHdmiC_Colorspace.

parameterdescription.para: is the XVidC_ColorFormat value to be converted

briefdescription.para: This function generates and sends Audio Metadata Packet.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem instance.

briefdescription.para: This function generates and sends SPD Infoframes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem instance.

briefdescription.para: This function generates and sends DRM Infoframes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem instance.

briefdescription.para: This function converts the XVidC_ColorDepth to XHdmiC_ColorDepth.

parameterdescription.para: is the XVidC_ColorDepth value to be converted

briefdescription.para: This returns the N value in FRL mode based on its Audio Sample Frequency.
This returns the the N Value based Audio Sampling Rate and TMDS Character Rate.
This returns the Audio Sample Frequency for FRL.
This returns the Audio Sampling Rate and TMDS Character Rate.

detaileddescription.para: This function is not expected to be called for CTS/N as 0.

briefdescription.para: This converts the Aud.

detaileddescription.para: Sampling Freq. Value to Audio Info-frame Sampling Freq. Format.

briefdescription.para: This converts the Audio Info-frame Sampling Freq.

detaileddescription.para: Format. to Audio Sampling Freq. Value.
